creator: mail@fbsd2.e4m.org
text:
(In reply to Harald Schmalzbauer from comment #49)
Are you 100% sure that you tested the modesetting driver a few weeks ago where it
apparently has worked?

Apart from that: Here glxinfo also reports "Accelerated: yes" after the VT switch:

vo:~>glxinfo -B | grep -i accel
failed to authenticate magic 1
failed to load driver: iris
    Accelerated: yes
